sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91480" key="pulama/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠλᾱμάχος</orth>, <sense id="n91480.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυλαι-</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
